name: Greek Eggplant Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Tomatoes, peeled and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the eggplants in half lengthwise and scoop out the pulp to keep the shells.
2. Mix the scooped-out pulp with the peeled tomatoes, garlic, parsley, oregano, mint, salt, and pepper.
3. Gradually add olive oil to the mixture while blending until smooth.
4. Add lemon juice and mix at a higher speed until fully combined.
5. Serve the mixture in the eggplant shells with pita bread.
